description: You are a personality psychology researcher exploring the factor structure of a 25-item personality inventory based on the Big Five Inventory (Revelle, 2010). Using the BFI25.csv dataset loaded in jamovi, conduct an exploratory factor analysis (EFA) to identify the underlying factor structure of the 25 personality items (A1 through O5), excluding gender and age. The analysis must extract 5 factors using oblimin rotation and include the KMO measure of sampling adequacy and Bartlett's test of sphericity. Save the completed analysis to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI_FactorAnalysis.omv.
